zh.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Goodrich於1645年11月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德時，她的父親John Goodrich27歲，母親Elizabeth Edwards21歲。她於1664年與Daniel Rose在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1711年6月在她的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Goodrich于1645年11月2日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德时，她的父亲John Goodrich27岁，母亲Elizabeth Edwards21岁。她于1664年与Daniel Rose在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1711年6月在她的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Goodrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Goderiche, Old English Gōdrīc, composed of the elements gōd ‘good’ + rīc ‘power’.
English: habitational name from Goodrich (Herefordshire), a shortened form for ‘castle Goodrich’, which takes its name from Godric Mapson, a holder of the estate recorded in the Domesday Book.
Americanized form of German Güttrich, cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Goodrick
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lincolnshire): variant of   Goodrich  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Goodrich was born on 2 November 1645, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, John Goodrich, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth Edwards, was 21. She married Daniel Rose in 1664, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in June 1711, in her hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Goodrich est née le 2 novembre 1645, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, John Goodrich, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Edwards, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Daniel Rose en 1664, à Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en juin 1711, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Goodrich è nata il il 2 novembre 1645 nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, John Goodrich, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Edwards, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Daniel Rose nel 1664, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel giugno 1711, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Goodrich(이)가 1645년 11월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Goodrich(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Edwards(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 w더스필드에서 Daniel Rose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1711년 6월 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Daniel Rose em 1664, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. ru.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Goodrich родилась 2 ноября 1645 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени John Goodrich было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Edwards, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Daniel Rose в 1664 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла июнь 1711 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

Se casó con Daniel Rose en 1664, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en junio de 1711, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
